text: Send fiat to Infinex the way you'd send it to a bank. It lands as USDC on-chain.

old_audit.placement_read: Light + Direct + Sustained + Bound — self-contained tempo; the motor is stalled at Gliding, not releasing into Dabbing. Drive read lands as Doing (Weight suppressed, Space+Time+Flow active but Flow is Bound, so the action stays functional-informational). No Spell, no Vision — the weight of changed reality that Infinex requires is missing. The copy is technically correct and movement-clean but sits in a register below the character's assigned placement.

infinex_fit.reason: self-contained is a beat-only / reserve tempo for Infinex, not a primary-allowed tempo. The full available palette includes self-contained as reserve only. More critically: self-contained (Light + Direct + Stable) carries no Weight-stress and no Flow — it cannot activate the Spell drive or the Penetrating aspect that define Infinex's placement. The through-action is 'to reveal that the bank wall just dissolved inside one account' — that dissolution requires either sombre (Strong + Bound weight of the old wall falling) or irradiant (Light + Free lift of the new possibility opening), or at minimum the sociable (Direct + Free) warmth of invitation. None of those factors are firing here. The copy is informational, not revelatory. Passion/time-pressure drift is not the problem here — the failure is the opposite: the copy has deflated below character, not overheated above it.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: sociable (Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing) — nearest structurally because it shares Direct + Light and the same motor chain (Gliding -> Dabbing), but requires Free flow instead of Bound, and a partner-credit spatial orientation. The lining ('the bank wall just stopped existing') wants the weight of sombre or the lift of irradiant, both of which are primary-allowed. Either would be legal and on-character.

voice_issues: The copy deploys the correct facts and omits correctly, but the through-action ('reveal that the bank wall just dissolved') is not performed — the text announces a mechanic rather than revealing a changed condition. The reader is told what to do and what happens, not shown that a wall they didn't know existed has stopped existing.

The simile 'the way you'd send it to a bank' is doing the right conceptual work (familiarity bridge) but is executing in a Light + Bound register that contains the revelation instead of releasing it. The simile becomes a suppressor rather than a setup.

'It lands as USDC on-chain' is the closest the copy comes to a revelation moment, but it is delivered flat (Gliding, not Dabbing) — the arrival weight is not loaded before the landing. There is no prepared Strong press that the Light landing can release against.
notes_for_actor: The motor you need is Gliding → Dabbing, and you have the Gliding. The Dabbing requires Quick — a sudden, light, accurate touch at the arrival point. Right now 'It lands as USDC on-chain' is a second Glide, not a Dab. Sharpen the arrival: the landing word ('on-chain', or whatever carries the revelation) needs to be a clean, quick, light contact — not another smooth continuation.

The through-action is revelation, not instruction. 'Send fiat to Infinex the way you'd send it to a bank' sets up the known world correctly — but you then need to break it, not continue it. The second sentence must register as a different kind of statement than the first. Right now both sentences are in the same tempo. The Lining says: the wall stopped existing. Make sentence two feel like a different room, not the same corridor.

Weight is absent. Self-contained is Light + Direct — that is the correct motor for beat-level informational copy, but Infinex's primary tempi require at least occasional Strong contact (commanding, practical, sombre, warm) or the character has no gravity. In a two-sentence unit, one of the two sentences should land with more force than the other. Currently both are Light. Consider whether the simile clause — 'the way you'd send it to a bank' — is the place to load weight (the old world was heavy; the old wall had weight), so the release into USDC on-chain can be genuinely Light by contrast.

Flow is Bound throughout. The through-action ('reveal that the wall dissolved') requires at least a moment of Free flow — a release, an opening, an overflow of implication beyond the stated fact. One small structural move: allow the second sentence to carry more than it literally says. 'It lands as USDC on-chain' tells the mechanic; it does not release the implication. A Free-flow version of the same fact lets the reader feel the space that has opened, not just the fact that was deposited.

Reserve self-contained for copy where Infinex is being functional and supportive (help text, confirmation messages, secondary callouts). For a release card announcing a structural change to how money enters the product, the character needs to be present at primary-tempo level — commanding, sombre, irradiant, or sociable. Pick one and commit to it. Do not split the difference with a smooth informational glide.

text:
Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things.

Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.

Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP the way you'd send it to a bank. It arrives on-chain.

old_audit.placement_read: Strong + Direct + Quick + Bound. The piece reads as a Doing Drive activation: Weight (Strong), Space (Direct), Time (Quick) all active; Flow (Bound) is the subdued/latent factor. This is institutional force delivered in short aimed bursts — the classic Pressing → Punching motor at sentence two, with a Dabbing close. The character is acting on the world with precision and economy. No dream-layer, no warm relational tissue, no distant-generous architecture. The mapper-who-already-decided is present, but the tone is closer to the banker executing a directive than the trailblazer revealing a dissolved wall.

infinex_fit.reason: commanding tempo (Strong + Direct, motor Pressing → Punching) is a Primary Allowed tempo for Infinex and the working actions are legal. However the Drive read is Doing (Flow subdued/latent), not Spell (Time subdued/latent) or Vision (Weight subdued/latent). The Spell Drive requires Time to recede and Flow to be active; Vision requires Weight to recede. Here Time is Quick and prominent, and Flow is Bound and prominent — both are asserting, not receding. Quick + Bound is the Passion quadrant of Mobile (unacknowledged: Quick + Bound motor Punching/Slashing) which is explicitly off-spec for Infinex. The piece has the right tempo label but the wrong Drive engine underneath it. The 'wall just dissolved' through-action requires the consequence to arrive with some suspension (Time receding) or generous release (Free Flow) — neither is present. The through-action ('reveal that the bank wall just dissolved') calls for a sombre or irradiant register underneath the commanding surface; what arrived is a command with urgency pressure baked into its speed.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: commanding at Spell-Drive depth: keep Strong + Direct (preserve the landing weight and straight-line path), let Time recede (slow the pivot — allow the historical wall sentence to be more sustained before the negation strikes), shift Flow toward Free (let 'they aren't anymore' release rather than close — the wall dissolving should feel like an opening, not a door shutting). Motor: Pressing → Punching remains but the Pressing phase needs more duration so the Punching release reads as inevitable rather than urgent. Alternatively: sombre (Strong + Bound, Adream outer) if the actor wants to lead with the weight of the dissolved wall rather than the strike.

factual_issues: Bridge.xyz fiat deposit code status: the fact receipt confirms Bridge.xyz is not yet in the platform codebase. The copy reads as a current capability ('Send USD... It arrives on-chain') without any future/upcoming qualifier. If the feature is not yet live, this is a factual presentation issue — the prose performs present-tense delivery of a not-yet-deployed function.
voice_issues: The through-action is 'reveal that the bank wall just dissolved' — but the prose performs the wall dissolving as a command announcement rather than a revelation. The difference: a revelation allows the reader to arrive at the discovery; a command tells the reader what has happened. Sentences one and two are pure tell — 'always been separate / aren't anymore' — with no movement that lets the reader experience the dissolution. The obstacle (reader skims a fintech announcement) is partially addressed by omitting Bridge.xyz, but the commanding tempo still reads as an announcement because the Quick + Bound motor closes the piece before the reader can feel the open space where the wall used to be.

The currency list (USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, COP) performs as a features enumeration even though the fact receipt marks 'supported currencies as a list' as not-the-point. The list is syntactically positioned as the proof of the claim, which re-introduces the rail-framing the lining was trying to dissolve.

'the way you'd send it to a bank' — this phrase does useful cognitive work (maps the familiar action) but 'to a bank' momentarily re-erects the two-world model the opening sentence was dismantling. The wall is named again just before the piece closes.
notes_for_actor: TIMING CORRECTION — let the Pressing phase breathe before the Punch: Sentence one ('have always been two separate things') is currently Quick-weighted because the pivot to sentence two is too fast. Extend the Pressing duration — the historical wall should feel like it has genuine mass before it's negated. One technique: add a syntactic pause or line break between sentences one and two that forces the reader to hold the weight of 'always' before the negation arrives.

FLOW CORRECTION — open the close: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' currently lands Bound — it closes. The through-action is dissolution, which is a Free-Flow event (something releasing, not shutting). Rewrite the negation sentence so it opens rather than terminates. E.g. shift from 'they aren't anymore' (door-closing) toward something that lets the space of the dissolved wall be felt as an opening. The sentence should release, not conclude.

DRIVE CORRECTION — subdue Time, activate Flow: The current Drive is Doing (Weight + Space + Time active, Flow subdued). Infinex at Spell Drive needs Time to recede and Flow to be active. Practically: reduce the Quick motor in the mid-section. The instruction sentence ('Send USD... It arrives on-chain') is operating at Fast transaction speed, which is Passion-adjacent pressure. Slow the arrival — let 'It arrives on-chain' be Sustained rather than Quick so the reader feels the permanence of the new state, not the speed of the transfer.

CURRENCY LIST — remove or reposition: The list is doing features work that undermines the wall-dissolution frame. If the six currencies must appear, move them below the three-sentence nucleus (as a subordinate detail) rather than inside the main body where they perform as a checklist. The nucleus should dissolve the wall; the list can confirm the width of the opening afterward.

BANK ECHO — cut 'to a bank': 'the way you'd send it to a bank' re-introduces the two-world vocabulary mid-close. The reader has just been told the wall is gone; naming 'a bank' as the reference point reinstates the distinction. Replace with a motion-based description of the familiar action (e.g. 'the way you'd send it to anyone') or cut the qualifier entirely and let 'Send USD... It arrives on-chain.' stand as the self-sufficient proof.

new_audit.infinex_fit_reason: Primary tempo is commanding (Stable / Strong + Direct), one of the five primary allowed Infinex tempi. Drive reads as Spell — resting formative drive for the stable|penetrating|flow cell. No passion/urgency/FOMO foreground. Lining (the bank-wall dissolved) remains hidden as structural consequence rather than stated thesis. Through-action (reveal that the bank wall just dissolved inside one account) is carried by the dissolution beat ('they aren't anymore') without naming it. No off-spec markers detected.
new_audit.placement_read: Stable character at rest in Spell drive. The copy maps a fact of the world (bank/wallet separation) as already resolved — the character holds the knowledge of how things work and states it without needing to demonstrate urgency or sell the mechanism. Resting Spell without visible Vision projection is legal for a single-beat X post; the Spell → Vision axis is a character property across an arc, not a per-line requirement.
publication_gate_issues: Bridge.xyz fiat deposit code status: release card confirms zero matches for 'bridge.xyz' across platform files at time of card creation. Copy claims 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore' and 'It arrives on-chain' — both imply the feature is live. Before publication, confirm Bridge.xyz virtual account code has landed in platform and the deposit flow is testable end-to-end. This is a ship-gate check, not a copy change.
notes_for_actor: The Pressing motor is holding cleanly across all three beats — do not accelerate into Punching. If you feel the urge to add 'now' or 'finally' or any time-pressure word anywhere, that is the Passion drift arriving. Resist it. The decisions were taken before the copy opened.

The currency list reads as Direct enumeration of a known set, which is correct. If a revision adds 'and more currencies coming' or any trailing expansion, it breaks the Bound flow and tips toward Free/irradiant register — audit that if it appears.

The Lining (the bank-wall stopped existing) is correctly hidden inside the structural consequence of beat 2. Do not let a revision name the Lining explicitly ('this means the old separation is gone') — that surfaces it as Outer and kills the dramatic gap.

Beat 3 ('It arrives on-chain') is the Pressing terminal — short, full weight, no apology. If a revision extends this sentence with a mechanism explanation ('via Bridge.xyz virtual accounts' or 'converted to USDC'), the through-action shifts from dissolution to rail-announcement, which is the obstacle named in the release card. Hold the landing.

The copy is currently three sentences across two visual breaks, which is tight for X. If a version tag ('V1', 'Spot V1') appears on the product name in any revision for this channel, flag it — version-tag register is off-spec for outward X posts per the voice rules.

Convert the bank analogy from equivalence to dissolution. 'The way you'd send it to a bank' tells the reader these systems are now equivalent. The lining requires the reader to feel that the wall between them stopped existing. Replace equivalence framing with outcome framing: what the reader now has that they did not have before.

Add Bound Flow to the first sentence, Free Flow to the second. Spell requires Bound containment — a sense that something is being held, that the speaker knows more than they are releasing. Sentence one should feel contained/authoritative; sentence two should release the fact. Currently both sentences are Free, which produces informational float rather than character weight.

Remove or invert the Quick Time signature. 'Converts and lands' reads as fast and easy — correct for the user experience, but it makes the speaker sound like they are selling a convenience feature. The character's tempo primary is commanding or sombre, both Sustained. Consider a construction that holds the duration of the transformation even briefly — a syntactic pause or a held verb — before releasing the USDC landing.

The through-action is dissolution, not delivery. Audit whether the reader, after reading these two sentences, feels that a wall came down or that they received a product update.
